name: xpath-helper
description: Find, generate, and test XPath expressions. Multiple ranked variants, element picker, zero telemetry.

scripts.build:all: wxt build && wxt build -b firefox && wxt build -b edge && wxt build -b opera
scripts.zip:all: wxt zip && wxt zip -b firefox && wxt zip -b edge && wxt zip -b opera
scripts.check: tsc --noEmit && biome check src/ wxt.config.ts vitest.config.ts && vitest run
